subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-'Alí-Ḥaydar, upon him be Glory, hath been mentioned. Therefore doth the Most Exalted Pen turn unto thee, that thou mayest hearken unto the Divine Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب علی حیدر علیه بهائی ذکرت نمود لذا قلم اعلی بتو متوجه تا ندای الهی را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @nearness and remoteness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
